name: Maya W.
title: I never thought yoga was for me
body: Six months in and it is the calmest hour of my week. Not once have I been made to feel like a beginner.

name: Isla E.
title: The warmest little studio
body: Small classes, real teachers, and everyone genuinely knows your name. A proper community.

name: Ella H.
title: Booked online in a minute
body: Easy booking, a friendly reminder the morning of, and a warm welcome at the door.

name: Daniel H.
title: Every body really is welcome
body: Stiff hips, zero experience and total nerves. There was a gentle option for all of it.

name: Daniel H.
title: My Sunday reset
body: The yin and restore class is something else. I leave feeling like a different person.

name: Leo W.
title: Sienna is a wonderful teacher
body: Patient, funny and never pushy. The beginners course was the best decision I made all year.

name: James H.
title: No mirrors, no competition
body: Exactly what was promised. Just a warm room and real space to breathe.
